title: infinite ominous bottles
description: makes trial spawners drop ominous bottles
body:
[![Kinetic Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1af71189dede4258766a75b4957acefce1910966.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1406)

makes trial spawners drop ominous bottles

the reason behind this is so the player don't have to find a outpost to have infinite ominous trials
